TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Paraguay, title = Paraguay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paraguay} }

S.FORM: Paraguay hya' ga cyux maki' tay 23 00 S, 58 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 406,752 sq km (maki' tay 60ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 397,302 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 9,450 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,862,812. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 53.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 43.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 2.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Asuncion. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 14 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Horacio Cartes, aring ryax 15 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Paraguay hya' ga cyux maki' tay 23 00 S, 58 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 406,752 sq km (maki' tay 60ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 397,302 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 9,450 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 6,862,812. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 53.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 43.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 2.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Asuncion. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 14 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Horacio Cartes, aring ryax 15 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: para…£uaj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** s~…ē, ** ** w na nan-me ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a as~…ēun ¶~ ®ion. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj jma…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßora ¶~ ®io ¶~ ®artes~…ē, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
